landing.heroSubtitle: Create legal contracts in Hebrew and Arabic with ease. Compliant with Israeli law, print-ready PDF.
landing.step1Desc: Pick from a variety of contract templates tailored to Israeli law.
landing.step2Desc: A smart wizard guides you step by step with a real-time preview.
landing.step3Desc: Get a bilingual, print-ready contract in PDF format.
landing.featureBilingualDesc: Contracts in Hebrew and Arabic at the click of a button.
landing.featureLegalDesc: Templates updated according to Israeli legislation.
landing.featureInstantDesc: Download a print-ready contract in minutes.
landing.featureAffordableDesc: Professional contracts at a fraction of a lawyer's cost.
landing.faq1Q: What languages are contracts generated in?
landing.faq1A: Every contract is generated in Hebrew and Arabic. English and Russian coming soon.
landing.faq2A: Our templates comply with Israeli law including the Rental Law. However, we recommend consulting a lawyer for complex situations.
landing.faq3Q: Can I edit a contract after creating it?
landing.faq3A: Yes, you can edit contracts in draft status without limits before downloading.
landing.faq4A: The first contract is free. After that, each contract costs ₪49 including VAT. Payment is secured through Stripe.
landing.finalCtaDesc: Create your first contract for free.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using the LegAIDoc platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use the Service. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time; continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: LegAIDoc is an AI-powered platform for generating bilingual (Hebrew-Arabic) legal documents, primarily for the Israeli rental market. The Service allows users to select templates, fill in details through a guided wizard, and download print-ready PDF contracts. The Service may also include electronic signature features, payment processing, and AI-assisted document analysis.

noLegalAdvice.title: 3. No Legal Advice
noLegalAdvice.content: LegAIDoc provides tools for document generation and does not provide legal advice. Using this Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. The generated documents are based on templates designed to reflect common provisions of Israeli law as of their last update date, but they may not address every specific legal situation and may not reflect recent legislative changes. We strongly recommend consulting a qualified attorney for complex legal matters, disputes, or situations requiring personalized legal guidance.

accountRegistration.title: 4. Account Registration
accountRegistration.content: To use the Service, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.

subscriptionPayments.title: 5. Payments and Subscriptions
subscriptionPayments.content: Certain features require payment. All prices are in Israeli New Shekels (ILS) and include 17% VAT as required by Israeli law. Payments are processed securely through Stripe. Installment payment options (Tashlumim) may be available for qualifying amounts. The first document is free; subsequent documents or subscription plans are charged as displayed at the time of purchase. All sales are subject to our refund policy. Tax invoices (חשבונית מס קבלה) are issued for every payment.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The LegAIDoc platform, including its templates, code, design, and branding, is owned by LegAIDoc and protected by intellectual property laws. Documents generated through the Service using your input belong to you. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the platform.

userContent.title: 7. User Content and Responsibility
userContent.content: You are solely responsible for the accuracy, legality, and completeness of the information you provide through the wizard and for the resulting documents. LegAIDoc does not verify the factual accuracy of user-provided data. You agree not to use the Service to generate documents for unlawful purposes.

prohibitedUse.title: 8. Prohibited Use
prohibitedUse.content: You may not: use the Service for fraudulent or illegal purposes; attempt to gain unauthorized access to the platform or other users' accounts; interfere with the proper functioning of the Service; use automated tools to scrape or extract data; impersonate another person or entity; or use the Service to generate documents that violate applicable laws.

limitation.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by Israeli law, LegAIDoc shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid to LegAIDoc in the twelve months preceding the claim. This limitation applies regardless of the legal theory on which the claim is based.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless LegAIDoc, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Service; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) documents generated using information you provided; or (d) your violation of any third-party rights.

electronicSignatures.title: 11. Electronic Signatures
electronicSignatures.content: The Service may offer electronic signature features. These electronic signatures provide evidence of agreement between parties but are not certified electronic signatures under the Israeli Electronic Signature Law 5761-2001. For transactions that require certified electronic signatures or carry the legal weight of a handwritten signature, you should consult a qualified professional and use a certified electronic signature provider. LegAIDoc does not guarantee the legal enforceability of electronic signatures in all contexts.

refundPolicy.title: 12. Refund Policy
refundPolicy.content: Under the Israeli Consumer Protection Law 5741-1981, consumers are entitled to a 14-day cooling-off period for remote transactions. Since generated documents are digital goods delivered immediately upon creation, the right of cancellation may not apply once a document has been generated and delivered. If you have not yet generated a document after payment, you may request a full refund within 14 days of purchase by contacting legal@legaidoc.co.il. Refunds for generated documents will be considered on a case-by-case basis at our discretion. The free first document does not constitute a paid transaction.

termination.title: 13. Account Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, engage in prohibited activity, or fail to pay for the Service. You may delete your account at any time through the settings page. Upon termination, your right to access the Service ceases, but previously generated documents remain available for download for 30 days.

governingLaw.title: 14. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Israel. Any disputes arising from these Terms or the use of the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts in Tel Aviv-Jaffa, Israel.

changes.title: 15. Changes to These Terms
changes.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a prominent notice on the platform. Your continued use of the Service after the effective date of the revised Terms constitutes acceptance.

contact.title: 16. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at: legal@legaidoc.co.il

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: LegAIDoc ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our AI-powered legal document generation platform. This policy applies to all users of the LegAIDoc website and services.

dataCollection.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect the following categories of personal data: Account information (name, email address, password hash); identity information (ID number, company name, address) which is encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM; payment information processed securely through Stripe (we do not store credit card numbers); document data you provide through the contract wizard; usage data including pages visited, features used, and interactions; technical data such as IP address, browser type, and device information collected through audit logs; and authentication data including session tokens and optional multi-factor authentication (TOTP) credentials.

dataUsage.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.content: We use your personal data for: providing the document generation service and processing your contracts; processing payments and issuing tax invoices; authenticating your identity and securing your account; improving our platform and user experience; complying with legal obligations under Israeli law; error monitoring and service stability through Sentry (when you have consented to performance tracking); and communicating with you about your account, transactions, and service updates.

dataStorage.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
dataStorage.content: Your data is stored in a PostgreSQL database hosted on secure cloud infrastructure. Sensitive personal information (ID numbers, company details) is encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM field-level encryption. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt with 12 salt rounds. All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. We implement Content Security Policy (CSP) headers, rate limiting, and comprehensive audit logging to protect your data.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication session management and storing your cookie consent preference. We use Sentry for error monitoring (essential for service stability) and optional performance tracing (only when you consent). We do not use advertising cookies or third-party analytics trackers. You can manage your cookie preferences through the cookie consent banner displayed on your first visit.

thirdPartyServices.title: 6. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.content: We share data with the following third-party services as necessary to operate the platform: Stripe (payment processing — subject to Stripe's privacy policy); Sentry (error monitoring and optional performance tracing); Google (if you use Google OAuth for authentication — subject to Google's privacy policy); Vercel (hosting infrastructure); Resend (transactional emails such as payment receipts); and AI service providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Generative AI (for contract analysis features only — documents submitted for AI analysis are processed by these providers via their API services, which do not use your data for model training). We have data processing agreements in place with all third-party service providers. We do not sell your personal data to any third party.

userRights.title: 7. Your Rights
userRights.content: Under the Israeli Privacy Protection Law 5741-1981, you have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of your personal data (subject to legal retention requirements); withdraw consent for optional data processing at any time; receive a copy of your data in a portable format; and object to processing of your data for purposes beyond the original collection purpose. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@legaidoc.co.il.

israeliLaw.title: 8. Israeli Privacy Law Compliance
israeliLaw.content: We comply with the Israeli Privacy Protection Law 5741-1981 and its regulations. Our database is registered with the Privacy Protection Authority as required by law. We process personal data only for the purposes described in this policy and with appropriate legal basis. You have the right to file a complaint with the Israeli Privacy Protection Authority if you believe your privacy rights have been violated.

dataRetention.title: 9. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active and as needed to provide the Service. Payment records and invoices are retained for 7 years as required by Israeli tax law. Audit logs are retained for 3 years for security and compliance purposes. When you delete your account, personal data is removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.

security.title: 10. Security Measures
security.content: We implement comprehensive security measures including: AES-256-GCM field-level encryption for sensitive data; bcrypt password hashing with 12 salt rounds; multi-factor authentication (TOTP) for administrative accounts; rate limiting on all API endpoints; comprehensive audit logging with IP and user-agent tracking; Content Security Policy (CSP) headers; and regular security reviews.

children.title: 11. Children's Privacy
children.content: The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will promptly delete it.

changes.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable law. Material changes will be communicated via email or a prominent notice on the platform at least 30 days before they take effect.

contact.title: 13. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at: privacy@legaidoc.co.il
